title: CW Consulting — Swiss Payroll, HR & Compliance
meta: Swiss payroll, HR administration, social insurance, source tax and cross-border employment support for SMEs across Switzerland, Italy and France.
hero_title: Payroll administration built for cross-border employers.
hero_lead: CW Consulting supports SMEs with Swiss payroll, social insurance, source tax, HR administration and cross-border employment coordination across Switzerland, Italy and France.
pos_t: A specialist partner for payroll accuracy, compliance control and administrative reliability.
pos_p: Designed for employers that need practical execution, clear documentation and reliable coordination with Swiss institutions, insurers and payroll stakeholders.
services_p: Focused support for companies that need Swiss payroll and HR administration without building an internal back office.
s1p: Monthly payroll, salary statements, payroll reporting and annual salary certificate preparation.
s2p: AVS/AHV, ALV, UVG, LPP/BVG coordination and employer-facing contribution workflows.
s3p: IFONTE, withholding tax review, employee status checks and documentation for quarterly and annual reporting.
s4p: Support for Switzerland–Italy–France employment situations, G permit cases and cross-border payroll questions.
s5p: Onboarding documents, employee records, contract support, HR checklists and administrative follow-up.
s6p: Government correspondence, insurer communication, process documentation and recurring administrative support.
payroll_t: From employee data to annual salary certificate.
payroll_p: A controlled payroll workflow connects onboarding, salary structure, permit status, social insurance, source tax, payroll reporting and annual reconciliation.
method_t: Documentation before action. Verification before submission.
m1p: Company structure, employees, permits and canton.
m2p: Salary, contract, insurance and tax context.
m3p: AVS/AHV, LPP/BVG, UVG, IFONTE and source-tax implications.
m5p: Payments, filings, invoices and open issues.
res_p: A future download center for payroll checklists, onboarding forms, annual review sheets and compliance guides.
book_t: Book a payroll or compliance consultation.
book_p: Choose a topic, provide basic company information and reserve a consultation slot through Google Calendar.
cal_p: Choose a suitable consultation time directly through Google Calendar.
q1: Do you replace a licensed lawyer, auditor or tax advisor?
a1: No. CW Consulting provides payroll, HR and administrative compliance support. Legal, audit, tax-planning or regulated advisory matters require the appropriate licensed professional.
a2: Yes. Support can cover payroll documentation, G permit context, social insurance coordination and source-tax review for Switzerland–Italy–France situations.
q3: How should a client prepare before booking?
a3: Prepare company canton or country, number of employees, permit situation, payroll issue, source-tax question and any relevant correspondence.
contact_t: Start with a short review of your payroll or HR requirement.
contact_p: Send a short message with your company situation, canton, number of employees and the type of support needed.
